creator: raimeetravel
caption:
I wish I’d known this for my trip to Japan…

But even if you’re planning your first trip, I think these off-the-beaten path cities deserve a spot on your Japan itinerary!

 #tokyooldmeetsnew #Sendai #Aomori @tokyotokyooldmeetsnew #pr

transcription.text: where should you go on your second trip to japan because yeah japan is one of those countries you will want to revisit over and over i know i have i've been about seven times now and this is what i would recommend for your second trip so you can see a totally different side of japan if you've already done tokyo kyoto osaka and the best part it's very easy to get to these areas of japan you'll take a 90 minute bullet train up to sendai from tokyo here are some of my favorite things to do around sendai that you can add to your itinerary like visiting the nika whiskey factory this was so cool and from there you can easily go up to aomori these were some of my favorite things to do there and yeah all of this is connected by trains and easy local transfers it's one of the simplest nature itineraries you can do from tokyo and one of the prettiest stay tuned for the next part of this series where i'll break down exact itineraries for both sendai and aomori
